build.beforeDevCommand: cd ../web && NEXT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_TARGET=desktop NEXT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_PROFILE=coder corepack pnpm dev --hostname 127.0.0.1 --port 3001
build.beforeBuildCommand: cd ../web && NEXT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_TARGET=desktop NEXT_PUBLIC_CLIENT_PROFILE=coder NEXT_OUTPUT=export corepack pnpm build

bundle.shortDescription: Agent Coder — 编码 Agent 客户端
bundle.longDescription: 面向用户的编码 Agent 桌面客户端(连接 Department Agent 平台)
